zIndex.label: z-index
zIndex.info: Stacking order of the widget. Increase if it sits behind other elements.

locale.label: Language
locale.info: Widget UI language. "Auto" detects the browser/page language.

buttonLabel.label: Button label
buttonLabel.info: Accessible label for the button. Empty uses the localized default.

draggableFab.label: Draggable button
draggableFab.info: Let visitors drag the button to reposition it.

hideOnPrint.label: Hide on print
hideOnPrint.info: Hide the widget on printed pages.

keyboardShortcut.label: Keyboard shortcut
keyboardShortcut.info: Shortcut to open the widget (e.g. ctrl+alt+a). Empty disables it.

storageKey.label: Storage key
storageKey.info: localStorage key for saved visitor preferences. Change only to avoid conflicts.

hidePoweredBy.label: Hide "powered by"
hidePoweredBy.info: Hide the provider credit in the widget panel.

debug.label: Debug logging
debug.info: Log diagnostic messages to the browser console.

disclaimer.label: Disclaimer text
disclaimer.info: Short note shown in the widget panel.

assetBase.label: Asset base URL
assetBase.info: Empty loads from the BAUER GROUP CDN (recommended, always current). Set only to self-host/mirror.

corePath.label: Core script URL
corePath.info: Overrides the derived core bundle URL. Advanced self-hosting only.

cssPath.label: Stylesheet URL
cssPath.info: Overrides the derived stylesheet URL. Advanced self-hosting only.

coreIntegrity.label: Core SRI hash
coreIntegrity.info: Subresource Integrity hash for a pinned core URL. Only with a fixed self-hosted version.

cssIntegrity.label: Stylesheet SRI hash
cssIntegrity.info: Subresource Integrity hash for a pinned stylesheet URL.

initiallyEnabled.label: Initially enabled features
initiallyEnabled.info: Comma-separated feature IDs to enable by default: fontSize, lineHeight, letterSpacing, contrast, grayscale, invertColors, dyslexiaFont, highlightLinks, pauseAnimations, bigCursor, focusOutline, readingMask, readingGuide, tts, structureNav

disabledFeatures.label: Hidden features
disabledFeatures.info: Comma-separated feature IDs to hide: fontSize, lineHeight, letterSpacing, contrast, grayscale, invertColors, dyslexiaFont, highlightLinks, pauseAnimations, bigCursor, focusOutline, readingMask, readingGuide, tts, structureNav
